summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries in a BESS shipment need dangerous-goods transport documentation aligned with the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, section 38.3, and the transport mode rules used for the shipment. Nigeria-side import conformity does not replace shipment-specific dangerous-goods classification, UN 38.3 test summary, packing instructions, marks, labels, and carrier documentation.
summary.zh: BESS货批中的锂电芯和电池需要符合《联合国试验和标准手册》第38.3节及对应运输方式规则的危险货物运输文件。尼日利亚侧进口符合性不能替代货批特定的危险货物分类、UN 38.3测试概要、包装说明、标记、标签和承运人文件。
summary.zht: BESS貨批中的鋰電芯和電池需要符合《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第38.3節及對應運輸方式規則的危險貨物運輸文件。奈及利亞側進口符合性不能替代貨批特定的危險貨物分類、UN 38.3測試概要、包裝說明、標記、標籤和承運人文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, section 38.3
Mode-specific dangerous-goods rules for air, sea, road, or multimodal transport

summary.en: China-side GB battery safety reports and SONCAP documents do not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence. Exporters should keep the UN 38.3 test summary, dangerous-goods declaration where required, MSDS/SDS, packing records, and cell or battery model traceability aligned with the actual shipped configuration.
summary.zh: 中国侧GB电池安全报告和SONCAP文件不能替代UN 38.3运输证据。出口商应保留UN 38.3测试概要、适用时的危险货物申报、MSDS/SDS、包装记录，以及与实际发运配置一致的电芯或电池型号追溯。
summary.zht: 中國側GB電池安全報告和SONCAP文件不能替代UN 38.3運輸證據。出口商應保留UN 38.3測試概要、適用時的危險貨物申報、MSDS/SDS、包裝記錄，以及與實際發運配置一致的電芯或電池型號追溯。

gap.en: Check whether batteries are shipped as cells, modules, racks, installed in equipment, packed with equipment, prototypes, damaged units, or returned units. The transport file should match the physical packing and should be reviewed separately from SONCAP market-access documents.
gap.zh: 应确认电池是以电芯、模组、电池架、装在设备中、与设备一起包装、样品、损坏件还是退运件形式运输。运输文件应与实际包装状态一致，并应独立于SONCAP市场准入文件进行审查。
gap.zht: 應確認電池是以電芯、模組、電池架、裝在設備中、與設備一起包裝、樣品、損壞件還是退運件形式運輸。運輸文件應與實際包裝狀態一致，並應獨立於SONCAP市場准入文件進行審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply; separate from SONCAP / SON import conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where dangerous-goods rules apply; China GB safety evidence is not a substitute for UN 38.3 transport evidence

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SONCAP and China GB reports do not close the transport gap. UN 38.3 and shipment-specific dangerous-goods documentation should be prepared before dispatch.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SONCAP和中国GB报告不能覆盖运输差距。发运前应准备UN 38.3及货批特定危险货物文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SONCAP和中國GB報告不能覆蓋運輸差距。發運前應準備UN 38.3及貨批特定危險貨物文件。
